groups.smithAdapter: remote agent product metadata, packaging, startup wrapper, and version/provenance manifest
risks: server service registrations may change across Code OSS commits

groups.smithAdapter: SSH bootstrap and terminal-safe connection state presentation
risks: handshake and URI transform contracts are internal
connection recovery semantics must be proven under fault injection

groups.smithAdapter: terminal contribution mapping and unsupported-surface classification
risks: webviews and custom editors are not terminal-native
extension activation can execute workspace-controlled code and must respect trust

groups.smithAdapter: terminal editor renderer with explicit byte, UTF-16, grapheme, and display-cell conversions
risks: Monaco DOM rendering is not reusable in a terminal
Unicode position mistakes can corrupt editing behavior

groups.smithAdapter: terminal implementations of presentation services and composition roots
risks: services may depend indirectly on browser or Electron implementations
context-key behavior must remain compatible with extension contributions

groups.smithAdapter: terminal layout, renderer, input routing, overlays, status, and accessibility surfaces
risks: pixel and DOM assumptions cannot leak into terminal components
mouse hit regions must be rebuilt on every frame and resize

groups.smithAdapter: compatibility registry with explicit native, textual fallback, external, unsupported, failed, and untested states
risks: overstating compatibility would create a false IDE parity claim
external handoff must be explicit and user-controlled
